issues.offending_span: though recent stock performance has disappointed shareholders [C001, C008]

issues.offending_span: Over the six months leading to late August 2025, Adobe's stock price fell to approximately $356.95, with shareholders losing 18.6% of capital while the S&P 500 climbed 8.8% [C008]

issues.recommended_fix: Change citation from [C008] to [C100] to accurately reflect the source of this stock performance data.
